name: Debbie Wasserman-Schultz
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $3,459,067 for Debbie Wasserman-Schultz in U.S. House, FL-25. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby. Additional primary-source statements and voting records should continue to be incorporated over time.
